_SETUP: Copy this file to settings.json and fill in the operator-specific values marked null.
_bankroll_doctrine_2026_05_04: Bankroll truth comes solely from on-chain wallet via src.runtime.bankroll_provider.current(). Removed in 2026-05-04 cleanup: fixed config-bankroll authority and temporary per-trade/aggregate cap rails; smoke testing belongs in one-off scripts, not as a live-cycle perma-gate.

zeus_capital_allocation._note: docs/rebuild/local_ledger_excision_2026-07-12.md Bankroll/Kelly 三量分立 (2026-07-13): explicit Zeus strategy-equity allocation on the shared wallet, resolved by src.runtime.bankroll_provider.resolve_zeus_equity_base(). mode='wallet_total' (this default) is BEHAVIOR-PRESERVING -- Kelly sizes off the full wallet-aggregate equity exactly as before, but every resolve logs a DEGRADED-attribution warning because that aggregate may include co-tenant/operator capital. Set mode='fraction' with a 'value' in [0,1] (Zeus equity = value * wallet equity) or mode='absolute' with a 'value' in USD (Zeus equity = min(value, wallet equity)) to stop deriving Zeus equity from other holders' capital. The allocation NUMBER is still an operator decision; this key only makes the mechanism explicit.

_entry_forecast_note: Entry forecast data contract — required by Settings.__init__ since 2026-05-03 (PR47). Source identity, calibration policy, and rollout mode must be set explicitly per operator deployment; mismatched values fail closed at boot. Defaults below mirror the live ECMWF Open Data lane.

edli._reactor_scan_interval_seconds_note: W4.3: edli_event_reactor poll cadence (process_pending's ONLY caller). Default=60 is the current A2 latency-SLA detection floor; do not raise without re-measuring the SLA (see main.py's job registration comment).
edli._fill_synchronizer_note: LX-T4 (docs/rebuild/local_ledger_excision_2026-07-12.md): continuous get_trades() poller into venue_trade_facts, independent of WS health/findings. src.ingest.fill_synchronizer.fill_synchronizer_cycle, 90s cadence.

edge._spread_tight_f_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 1000+ ENS snapshots per city.
edge._spread_wide_f_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 1000+ ENS snapshots per city.

exit._near_settlement_hours_note: HARDCODED. Replace after 100+ near-settlement trades per city.
exit._daily_hurdle_rate_note: Opportunity-cost rate per day of locked capital. HARDCODED.

feature_flags._settlement_coverage_hierarchy_enabled_n: F1: hierarchical settlement-coverage calibrator (src/calibration/settlement_coverage_hierarchy.py). Default OFF = byte-identical current behavior.

ops._posterior_staleness_alert_hours_rationa: 12h = one full provider refresh interval; the 30h forecast_posteriors TTL (expires_at) is the hard cliff after which entries silently starve. Alerting at 12h leaves an 18h repair window before that cliff. Incident proof: the 2026-07-13 08:15 CONUS live-posterior blackout onset would have alerted at 20:15 under this threshold, instead of running dark until the silent TTL expiry at 2026-07-14T06:00+. See src/control/live_health.py::_posterior_starvation_surface.
